Reviews Contact

About Legacy Masonry

12+ years serving Philadelphia and surrounding areas

Since 2012, Legacy Masonry has been preserving Philadelphia's architectural heritage one brick at a time. Founded by third-generation masons, we understand how Philly's unique climate and aging infrastructure demand specialized solutions.

We don't cut corners. Every tuckpointing job, chimney rebuild, and foundation repair follows historic preservation standards while incorporating modern durability. Our crews train continuously on Philadelphia-specific challenges like row house settlement and salt damage.

When we're not restoring Rittenhouse Square brownstones, we're volunteering masonry skills for neighborhood playgrounds and community gardens. This city built us - we return the favor daily.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Legacy Masonry

Trusted masonry professionals serving Philadelphia, PA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-mas-r94
